mapper.select: SELECT ITEM.ITEM_NO AS itemNo , ITEM.ITEM_NAME AS itemName , MIN(ITOP.PRICE) AS price , ITDE.MFD AS mfd , ITDE.EXP AS exp , ITDE.ITEM_DESCRIPTION AS itemDescription , ITDE.ITEM_WEIGHT AS itemWeight , ITDE.ITEM_WIDTH AS itemWidth , ITDE.ITEM_LENGTH AS itemLength , ITDE.ITEM_HEIGHT AS itemHeight , ITDE.ITEM_REMARK AS itemRemark , ITEM.DELETED_DT AS deletedDt , ITEM.ITEM_STATUS AS itemStatus FROM ITEM ITEM LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION_GROUP ITOG ON ITOG.ITEM_NO = ITEM.ITEM_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_OPTION ITOP ON ITOP.GROUP_NO = ITOG.GROUP_NO LEFT JOIN ITEM_DETAIL ITDE ON ITDE.ITEM_NO = ITEM.ITEM_NO WHERE ITEM.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} GROUP BY ITEM.ITEM_NO , ITEM.ITEM_NAME , ITDE.MFD , ITDE.EXP , ITDE.ITEM_DESCRIPTION , ITDE.ITEM_WEIGHT , ITDE.ITEM_WIDTH , ITDE.ITEM_LENGTH , ITDE.ITEM_HEIGHT , ITDE.ITEM_REMARK , ITEM.DELETED_DT , ITEM.ITEM_STATUS
SELECT IMG_URL FROM ITEM_IMAGES WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} AND DELETED_DT IS NULL ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC

SELECT ITOG.GROUP_NO AS groupNo, ITOG.GROUP_NAME AS groupName, ITOP.OPTION_NO AS optionNo, ITOP.OPTION_NAME AS optionName, ITOP.PRICE AS price FROM ITEM_OPTION_GROUP ITOG JOIN ITEM_OPTION ITOP ON ITOP.GROUP_NO = ITOG.GROUP_NO WHERE ITOG.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ORDER BY ITOG.GROUP_NO, ITOP.OPTION_NO
